reviews.review_description: So I tap the icon to open topple and it shows the loading screen but then just exits out devs   I need help

developer_response.body:
Hey pitypiq!

Dev here - I just ran into the same problem! I have no idea what's causing this, but please know that I'm on it :) Thanks for your patience!!

- Tejas

---
Update: 12/31/2025

I just solved the issue! Thanks again for letting me know about the problem pitypiq, your the best! Enjoy, and if you can, update your rating once you've played a bit! I'd love to know about what you think!

Happy New Years!
- Tejas

reviews.review_description: This game is a simple concept excellently executed! Everything is so intuitive and satisfying. I love the sound effects for the pieces being set and I'm addicted to knocking them over and resetting them. Great stuff!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kinds words and review! We can't wait to continue to update and add features that make it easier for our Domino World community to create and share!

-Tejas

reviews.review_description:
It's simple, and easy to use!! Regularly updated and I'm already having a ton of fun.

Relived my childhood of placing dominos all over my room and then toppled all of them over without worrying about the mess!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your extremely kind review! We can't wait for new updates and features in 2025!

- Tejas
